'''''Adventure in Beggar's Canyon''''' is a paperback children's book by [[Jane Mason]] and illustrated by [[Gary Ciccarelli]]. It tells a story of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his friend [[Windy Starkiller|Windy]].

==Plot summary==
The story begins with a brief summary of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Then it shows Luke and Windy entering their [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]]. Luke suggests going to shoot [[Womp rat/Legends|womp rats]] at [[Beggar's Canyon/Legends|Beggar's Canyon]]. Windy agrees, and they fly off. Soon, the skyhopper hits the edge of a cliff and crashes. Luke and Windy encounter [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] and [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]], but they chase off the Jawas and avoid the Sand People. Once they decide to camp, they hear a [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragon]]. As soon as the dragon starts to attack, a mysterious figure appears and frightens the dragon. It turns out to be [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who rescues Luke and Windy and, using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to tame the creature, they ride a [[Dewback/Legends|dewback]] back to Luke's home.
